name: html-to-markdown
description: Fast, lossless HTML→Markdown conversion with structured metadata, tables, and document-structure extraction.

interface.longDescription: Convert HTML to Markdown, Djot, or plain text with a single-pass Rust engine. Extracts metadata (title, OG tags, JSON-LD, headers, links, images), GFM tables, inline images, and a structured document tree. Fetches and converts live URLs. Runs locally via the html-to-markdown CLI; plugin ships skills covering conversion, metadata, tables, and URL fetching across CLI and 12 language bindings.
defaultPrompt: Convert this HTML file to Markdown
Fetch a URL and convert it to Markdown
Extract metadata and tables from this HTML
